info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Oracle WebLogic Monitoring and Diagnostics API

description.content:
RESTful API for accessing runtime monitoring data, diagnostics information, and performance metrics for Oracle WebLogic Server domains. Provides read-only access to the domainRuntime and serverRuntime bean trees for monitoring server states, application runtimes, JDBC data source health, JMS statistics, thread pool utilization, and server lifecycle management operations.

Contact Support:
 Name: Oracle Support
